project.name: LibMgnt
project.status: Librarian Command Center V2 + Bento Dashboard Completed

database_schema.summary: Database quan hệ PostgreSQL quản lý: Người dùng, Danh mục, Sách, Phiếu mượn và Phí phạt trễ hạn (fineAmount).
database_schema.relationships_explained: 1 Category có nhiều Book. 1 User có nhiều BorrowRecord. 1 BorrowRecord có nhiều BorrowItem. Quá hạn được tính động dựa trên dueDate.

api_endpoints.explained: Login: receives email/password, returns user info + JWT token
Register: creates new user, returns user info + JWT token
Get current profile info via JWT token
Get summary metrics for a specific month (borrows, returns, overdues, fines)
List books with quantity below threshold (Command Center V2)
Get all borrow/return activities for today (Command Center V2)
List overdue items with fine estimation and reader contact info
Audit inventory: state breakdown, dead stock, and best sellers
Get reader detail with computed stats
Process book returns, calculate fines (5,000 VND/day) atomically

business_rules: Strict DRY principle, no logic duplication
Shared UI components must reside in src/components/ui
Compute-on-read Overdue Pattern for real-time accurate state
Fine Calculation: fine = overdueDays * 5,000 VND, persisted upon return
Workflow-Driven Dashboards: Favor actionable operational views over passive data
Branded Reporting: All official PDF exports must include system branding (header/footer)
Print Optimization: Use @media print to hide non-content UI during document printing
Dead Stock: Defined as books with no borrow activity in the last 6 months
Low Stock Alert: Triggered when availableQuantity < 3
features: Librarian Command Center: Actionable Bento Grid dashboard (Signals, Overdue, Inventory Alerts)
Official Reporting: Branded PDF generation and print-optimized views
Inventory Audit: Dead stock detection and best-seller tracking
Financial Reconciliation: Real-time ledger for daily fine collection
Admin Reporting System: Monthly, Inventory, and Reader snapshots
Export System: CSV (PapaParse) and PDF (jsPDF) support
ISBN Integration: Smart book info auto-fetch with cover preview
Borrow Management: POS-style workflow with real-time validation

patterns: Command Center Pattern: Actionable-first UI design (Bento Grid)
Branded Export Engine: Unified helper for official document generation
Print-optimized Layouts using global CSS media rules
Generic DataTable + useDataTable Hook for server-side resources
gotchas: JSX Escaping: Use > or {'<'} for special characters in JSX text to avoid build errors
TypeScript Verbatim: Use 'import type' for entities to comply with verbatimModuleSyntax
Folder Encapsulation: Ensure UI components are imported from their specific folder (e.g., @/components/ui/badge/badge)
Prisma Aggregation: Use sum/count instead of groupBy for non-existent status fields
Browser CSV: Use PapaParse instead of json2csv
Dark Mode Contrast: Use isDark prop for StatsCard to fix text visibility on dark backgrounds
knowledge_items: English Localization for all UI and code comments
